NarrativeTemplate: Cycle {cycle}: {director} is replaced. {new_director} takes the chair and the room recalibrates.
Cycle {cycle}: two divisions quietly fold their books together. Standing realigns overnight.
Cycle {cycle}: a splinter group breaks off, taking budget and grudges with them.
Cycle {cycle}: the comptroller's office trims discretionary spend across the division.
Cycle {cycle}: an unspent allocation from another division is rerouted to the player's books.
Cycle {cycle}: an old operation surfaces in the press. Names are redacted; the date isn't.
Cycle {cycle}: a rival faction has been reading the player's mail. Containment is theoretical.
Cycle {cycle}: the megacorp's stock moves and every ledger flexes with it.
Cycle {cycle}: a late-stage purge. {new_director} arrives with a list and no patience.
Cycle {cycle}: an internal auditor leaks. The story has receipts.
